title: pi-context --pi-bound composes context in-process via loadContext, replacing the script's tsx+python3 pipeline
context: scripts/launch-constrained-pi.sh derives per-target context through a two-stage shell pipeline (a tsx JSON emit feeding a python3 JSON->CSV stage). Porting to the CLI can either shell the same pipeline or compose in-process.
decision: Compose the context in-process via a single loadContext call in the CLI, replacing the tsx+python3 two-stage pipeline. This is a deliberate replacement, not a behavior-preserving port of the shell stages.
consequences: No tsx or python3 subprocess dependency at launch.
The composition logic moves into typed CLI code, testable in-process.
Output equivalence to the script's pipeline must be demonstrated, since the mechanism differs.
